columns.name: FKNR_FRA
columns.description: Flytt number from which the move originates

columns.name: FKNR_TIL
columns.description: Flytt number to which the move is going

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT_BEST
columns.description: Timestamp when the best order was made

columns.name: BRUKER
columns.description: User who performed the move operation

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT_FLYTTET
columns.description: Timestamp when the move was executed

columns.name: HOLDES
columns.description: Indicator if the record is held (Y/N)

columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Department number associated with the move operation
